name: dashboard-from-pasted-csv
query:
Here's our Q4 numbers as CSV — make me a dashboard:
region,revenue,growth
NA,12400,18
EMEA,8900,11
APAC,6200,24
expected_behavior: Writes one .html file to ~/Downloads/ with kebab-case name
Includes Chart.js with Chart.defaults.animation = false and theme-aware colors
Returns a file:// link in the response and opens the file in the browser
